english_text:
A B C D C B A
R A C E C A R
alt_text: Two parallel chiastic-structure diagrams: top row spells 'A B C D C B A' around a central dark-blue 'D'; bottom row spells 'R A C E C A R' (the palindromic 'RACE CAR') around a central dark-blue 'E'. Purple arrows on each side show inward symmetry.
notes: Illustrates ring composition by analogy with the English palindrome 'racecar' — common in lectures on Quranic literary structure.
